displayTitle: The Clone Wars S02E01: Holocron Heist
synopsis: Cad Bane infiltrates the Jedi Temple and attempts to steal an ancient Jedi Holocron. It's up to Ahsoka, Anakin and Obi-Wan to stop the bounty hunter from escaping with the valuable Jedi artifact.
title: The Clone Wars S02E01: Holocron Heist
